title: Diandranthus wardii
taxonomy: Diandranthus wardii is a genus and species of flowering plant in the family Aizoaceae. This plant is native to the island of Socotra, off the coast of Yemen. The classification of Diandranthus wardii places it within the larger plant kingdom, specifically within the class Magnoliopsida. Further classification categorizes it as an order Caryophyllales, family Aizoaceae, genus Diandranthus, and species D. wardii. Its classification is significant for understanding the plant's evolutionary history and relationships with other species.
uses: Diandranthus wardii, a species of flowering plant, is reported to have various medicinal properties.
